question_text: Two objects are shown on distance-time graphs. Object A has a steep line, and Object B has a gentle slope. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Object B is travelling faster than Object A

options.label: B
options.text: Object A is travelling faster than Object B

options.label: C
options.text: Both objects are travelling at the same speed

explanation: On a distance-time graph, the steeper the line, the faster the object is moving. Object A has a steep line, so it covers more distance in the same time as Object B, making it faster.
